tool_args.label: Employee Engagement Survey findings
tool_args.raw_text: most employees indicated that they felt proud to work for the agency... more than half of the agency's employees don't feel valued for their work... don't feel positive about their career prospects

payload.claim_text: Most employees indicated that they felt proud to work for the agency, but more than half don't feel valued for their work and don't feel positive about their career prospects.
payload.subject: agency employees
payload.description: Results of the Employee Engagement Survey discussed by President Davey

evidence_refs.source_quote: He highlighted that most employees indicated that they felt proud to work for the agency. He also reported that the survey showed room for improvement. He noted that more than half of the agency's employees don't feel valued for their work they do and don't feel positive about their career prospects.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: Employee improvement plans from survey results
tool_args.raw_text: the agency will be undertaking to develop more paths to advancement, make improvements to employee facilities, and expand employee recognition

payload.claim_text: To address the survey results, the agency will develop more paths to advancement, make improvements to employee facilities, and expand employee recognition.
payload.subject: agency

evidence_refs.source_quote: to address those results, the agency will be undertaking to develop more paths to advancement, make improvements to employee facilities, and expand employee recognition

payload.subject: 29 worst performing bus routes

evidence_refs.source_quote: He reported improvements on the 29 worst performing bus routes and thanked the Bus Road Operations and Operations Planning teams as well as NYPD and NYCDOT for their work on that initiative.
